title: Matched-lead record (v5.4.0 pipeline stage 4 output — one record in matched_leads.json)
description: A record in matched_leads.json, the idempotent aggregator output (19_aggregator_idempotency_rule.md). Each matched lead carries one or more aggregated signals; each signal is a group of leads-base records that shared the full 18.B aggregation key, merged per the 18.C within-group contract and the 18.D cross-source rule. matched_leads.json is the aggregate output and is NEVER an aggregator input (19.C). Every matched lead MUST carry at least one signal from a PRIMARY_EVENT_SOURCE (13.5 row provenance rule).

lead_id.description: Unique id for the matched lead. Deterministic given the same base-file inputs (19.D idempotency invariant).

primary_parcel_id.description: Resolved county-canonical parcel id, or null when parcel_resolution_status is UNRESOLVED / REVIEW_REQUIRED (13.14).

owner_name.description: The debtor / lead subject per 17. The 17.E placeholder when parcel_resolution_status is REVIEW_REQUIRED. Never a filer (20 Check 12).

filer_entity.description: Filer name (17.E). A known-filer pattern may appear here and only here, never in owner_name.

review_reason.description: 17.E routing reason. Non-null when parcel_resolution_status is REVIEW_REQUIRED.

enrichment_status.description: 13.14.1 enrichment status, tracked independently of parcel_resolution_status.

signals.description: Aggregated signals on this lead. minItems 1: a lead with zero signals is not a lead (13.5). Each item is one 18.B aggregation group.

aggregation_key.description: The 18.B key tuple this group collapsed on.

signal_type.description: Operator-facing display label (18.B). The signal chip text; the count badge shows count when count > 1.

count.description: Number of base records in this group (18.C). count > 1 is legitimate stacking only when it equals the number of distinct instrument_numbers (18.E); count > distinct instrument count is a dedup failure.

instrument_numbers.description: Distinct instrument numbers across the group (18.C). The 18.E union key.

source_urls.description: Distinct source proof URLs across the group (18.C / 18.D).

evidence_ids.description: Distinct evidence ledger entry ids across the group (18.C).

source_ids.description: Distinct source_ids contributing to this group. More than one entry means a 18.D cross-source merge.
Distinct source_ids contributing any signal to this lead.

evidence_ids.description: Union of all evidence ledger entry ids across this lead's signals.

lead_status.description: Lead lifecycle status per FRAMEWORK_VERSION.json lead_status_lifecycle / 09_output_schemas.md. Optional at aggregator output; the dashboard-build stage sets it.
